query:
SELECT 
  d.archetype,
  COUNT(f.id) as total_feedback,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN f.accuracy IN ('very_inaccurate', 'inaccurate') THEN 1 END) as rejection_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN f.accuracy IN ('very_inaccurate', 'inaccurate') THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(f.id), 2) as rejection_rate
FROM diagnostics d
INNER JOIN feedbacks f ON d.id = f.diagnosticId
GROUP BY d.archetype
ORDER BY rejection_rate DESC;
